snippets.snippet: Hotelnya nyaman, semua staff ramah, area hotel bersih.
Staffs are satisfying, quite helping and caring.
Space bilik besar untuk harga rm110.
I recommend staying at Hilani Boutique Hotel in Banda Aceh.
The room was clean and comfortable,
The place is new, room is spacious and clean.
I love everything, from the room to the staffs.
Big airy room, nearby to laundry services, local food.
Pelayanan di Hilani Boutique Hotel luar biasa!

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 3-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 0-0 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 1-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 3 years and older are considered adults.

reviewSnippets: I recommend staying at Hilani Boutique Hotel in Banda Aceh.
I love everything, from the room to the staffs.
Pelayanan di Hilani Boutique Hotel luar biasa!
Staff is very helpful and friendly!
Big airy room, nearby to laundry services, local food.
The place is new, room is spacious and clean.
The room was clean and comfortable,
I love everything, from the room to the staffs.
The place is new, room is spacious and clean.
Big airy room, nearby to laundry services, local food.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is comfortable and clean, the staff is super nice and friendly, and the price is still affordable considering the facilities, the food is also good, basically recommended for those who want to be close to the Banda Aceh terminal.
comments.originalComment: Hotelnya nyaman dan bersih, staffnya super baik dan ramah banget, untuk harga juga masih affordable sesuai dengan fasilitasnya, makanannya juga oke, pokoknya recommended untuk yang mau dekat dgn terminal banda aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Fijn hotel met heel vriendelijk personeel. Goede kamer met heerlijk groot bed. Goed ontbijt en goed bereikbaar.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: My first experience in Banda Aceh was during a business trip. This hotel is highly recommended because it is located in a clean area with many dining options. The hotel quality is very good with very clean rooms, and the hotel environment is also clean. The hotel staff are very friendly, the beds are also very clean and very comfortable.
comments.reviewTitle: One of the highly recommended hotels.
comments.originalTitle: Salah satu hotel yang Sangat direkomendasi
comments.originalComment: Pengalaman saya pertama x ke Banda Aceh karena ada perjalanan dinas,hotel ini sangat direkomendasi kan karena lokasi yang bersih banyak tempat makan.kwalitas hotel sangat oke dengan kamar yang sangat bersih lingkungan hotel juga bersih,staf hotel yang sangat-sangat ramah,tempat tidur juga sangat bersih dan sangat nyaman.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
- Zero hospitality. 
- Cockroaches are running around in the room, even where the cups are placed.
- No toilet paper neither hand towel. When I asked they said it’ll cost them much, so they don’t provide it.
- There were a few days of black out. The owner instructed the management to shut down the generator every 2 hours, left all guesses in dark and hot in our rooms. When I made a complain, the owner said she is worried the generator will blow up. She said as same as we drive cars. We need to shut down the engine if it is too hot and can’t drive without having a break. What a stupid nonsense that I ever heard in my life!
- Coffee cups and spoons are dirty and left out in the room until I called them to clean it up. 
-  No milk no butter. The reason was about cost to spend on things. Food was cold and no difference in 5 days. 
- Internet is weak. 
- Staffs parked their motorbikes blocking the entrance ramp. They don’t bother to open the door or help us to carry our luggage through the stairs. In fact, he was laughing when I complained about no access to ramp. When I said “It’s not funny”, he was laughing even more. 
- Room was not cleaned properly. Bathroom floor was dirty and sink has yellow mould stains. Housekeeping doesn’t even bother to mop the floor and brush the toilet. 
- No standard apply in this place. 
- Hot water was limited. No hot shower for the last three days when we stayed. Also, water pressure was very low. 
- No one even bother to help us carrying our luggage from second floor as the lift was not working as per owner instruction. Worried about the generator blowing up.
comments.reviewTitle: AVOID THIS PLACE. There is no standard. No basic needs are met. They don’t care about hospitality and only want more pro

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is really great, the rooms are clean and spacious, and the service is friendly. The food is also delicious 😍.
comments.originalComment:
Mantaap sekali hotelnya, bersih kamar nya luas pelayanannya juga ramah 
Makanan nya juga enak 😍

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: New hotel very clean and comfortable to stay.
comments.reviewTitle: overall is good. keep it up to maintain

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Comfortable hotel, affordable prices but with decent facilities, I've been on a staycation this week. At Hilani... Truly satisfying.. All the staff are friendly.
comments.reviewTitle: The hotel is comfortable, affordable, but has decent facilities. I have been on a staycation here for a week. At Hilani... Truly satisfying.. All the staff are friendly.
comments.originalTitle: Hotel ternyaman, harga terjangkau tapi fasilitas ok punya,  seminggu ini saya staycation. Di. Hilani... Sungguh memuaskan.. Staf semua ramah
comments.originalComment: Hotel ternyaman, harga terjangkau tapi fasilitas ok punya,  seminggu ini saya staycation. Di. Hilani... Sungguh memuaskan.. Staf semua ramah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Highly recommended to stay here, please maintain the good service and rooms. The hot water faucet should be checked again because it is not warm enough, otherwise everything is okay.
comments.originalComment: Sangat rekomen untuk menginap disini mohon di pertahankan untuk pelayanan dan kamar yang baik, untuk ditingkatka kran air hangat dicek kembali karena kurang hangat selebihnya oke

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Highly recommended for those staying in Banda Aceh, the rooms are spacious, the breakfast is delicious, and the prices are affordable.
comments.originalComment: Sangat di rekomendasi untuk yang staycation di Banda Aceh, kamarnya luas, sarapannya enak dan harganya affordable

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: This is so far is the best boutique hotel I've stayed in Banda Aceh. The breakfast were delicious, the staff were very helpful and most importantly the hotel keep the facilities clean for the guests!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is amazing, clean and fragrant, the staff are friendly, beautiful and handsome.
comments.reviewTitle: The hotel is clean and fragrant, the staff is friendly.
comments.originalTitle: Hotelnya bersih and wangi, stafnya ramah
comments.originalComment: Hotelnya wah, bersih dan wangi, stafnya ramah cantik dan ganteng

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Sangat rekomen lebih baik dari grand arabia. Harga murah tp bilik besar siap breakfast walaupun simple tapo lagi bersih dan sedap dari grand arabia Hotel baru ada lift. Sape yang bajet boleh duduk sini sebab breakfast sedap, bilik and toilet bersih, tilam empuk gila, katil besar boleh tidur 2dws 3kanak tp kena melintang. Space bilik besar untuk harga rm110. Depan hotel ada mart boleh jalan kaki ja. Tempat pun tak sibuk tenang ja..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The staff are friendly and attentive, always ready to assist with check-in, transport, or local tour arrangements.

Overall, Hilani Boutique Hotel offers great comfort, good value, and excellent service—a perfect choice for anyone visiting Banda Aceh.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Had a really nice experience here. The staff were very helpful and welcoming, the room was clean and comfortable, and the food was delicious. Definitely a great choice for anyone looking for a pleasant stay.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
I recommend staying at Hilani Boutique Hotel in Banda Aceh. The hotel has a modern boutique style with a warm and welcoming atmosphere, making it suitable for both business and leisure travelers.

The rooms are clean, spacious, and comfortable, equipped with air conditioning, free WiFi, Netflix, Smart TV and cozy beds for a restful night.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Quite a new hotel. The room is spacious, good cleaness, with quite adequate room facilities, the only minus is no safety box. Staffs are satisfying, quite helping and caring. Overall rating 8.5/10. Recommended.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel and its property are nice because they are still new, the staff service is good and friendly, and issues are handled quickly. The downside, in my opinion, is the absence of an elevator, which makes going up and down the stairs a bit tiring. Overall, it's good and I recommend staying here.
comments.originalComment: Hotelnya beserta propertinya bagus karna mungkin masih baru, untuk pelayanan stafnya baik dan ramah, masalah cepat ditangani. Minusnya menurut saya tidak adanya lift, sehingga agak capek naik turun tangga ya. overall bagus dan recommended nginap disini

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: big airy room, nearby to laundry services, local food. this hotel has a good ambience and great staff

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The place is new, room is spacious and clean. Staff is very helpful and friendly! Breakfast provided is sumptuous. Will be back again!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: i love everything, from the room to the staffs. all awesome. thank you for being a great host. we will definitely return.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Saya sangat berpuas hati dengan penginapan di hotel ini. Biliknya besar dan selesa, sesuai untuk keluarga atau mereka yang inginkan ruang yang luas. Lokasinya juga sangat strategik — berdekatan dengan jalan utama dan banyak kedai, jadi sangat mudah untuk membeli barang keperluan atau mencari tempat makan.

Sarapan pagi yang disediakan adalah memuaskan dengan pilihan yang mencukupi untuk memulakan hari. Kemudahan lif juga memudahkan pergerakan terutamanya bagi warga emas atau mereka yang membawa bagasi berat.

Paling saya hargai ialah sikap staf yang sangat mesra dan membantu. Secara keseluruhan, hotel ini sangat sesuai untuk sesiapa yang ingin menginap di tempat yang mudah diakses dan selesa.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Clean as it's a new hotel...
Hope they can continue with it.
comments.reviewTitle: Simple modern design hotel with convenient facilities nearby

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Pelayanan di Hilani Boutique Hotel luar biasa! Semua fasilitas dan makanan sangat memuaskan. Resepsionisnya, Bapak yang jaga saat itu, bahkan mengingat nama tamu—kesan personal yang jarang ditemui. Saat sarapan, saya juga didatangi langsung oleh staf yang ramah banget, namanya Bapak Hilman. Semoga pelayanannya terus meningkat ke depannya. Fasilitasnya kemarin sudah oke banget, akan lebih lengkap lagi kalau ada layanan laundry. Terima kasih atas pengalaman menginap yang menyenangkan!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Some staff look likes not professional staff of the hotel, because during guest entry the lobby, that staff still with that smartphone..
Overall this hotel is good,
Only Lift elevator not available, you can imagine if you got 4 floors room and carried the big luggage to the floor.

Hopefully, the management of Hilani hotel kindly resolved that issue and to be provided lift elevator as soon as possible.
